rationale: Selected n_latent=12 as it maximises invariant_subspace_corr (0.7833) across the 3-rank sweep (ties broken by preferring lower rank for parsimony).

wave_b_prepositioning.evidence: Invariant subspace corr varies meaningfully across ranks (spread=0.096); chosen rank n_latent=12 is best of those tried but does not cross 0.85. Wave A reduced but did not eliminate the structural concern; deferred fixes (masked loss, shorter T) remain on the table.
